description: A logistics manager needs to find the exact location of a specific pallet of engines within the factory.

nodes.task_description: Get the pallet ID number from the manager.
Query the factory's RFID tracking system using the pallet ID.

expected_outcome.value: The system returns the last known location of the pallet.

nodes.task_description: Display the location on a map of the factory floor.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides the manager with the pallet's location: 'Zone C, Aisle 5'.
